title: Autonomous Agentic Wealth Management Chatbot
content: Built an agentic AI chatbot for financial risk analysis and adaptive investment planning using RAG, chain-of-thought prompting, LangChain agents, ChromaDB, GPT-4, Flask, and Microsoft Fabric. The system supported contextual memory and tool-using multi-agent reasoning.

title: Multimodal RAG-Based Food Recommendation System
content: Developed a multimodal recommendation chatbot using AWS Bedrock, FAISS, Titan embeddings, Claude Sonnet, Streamlit, and S3. The system combined image and text understanding for context-aware food recommendations.

title: Conversational EDA Chatbot
content: Created a conversational exploratory data analysis assistant using GPT-4, LangChain, Streamlit, MySQL, and the OpenAI API. The system converted natural-language questions into SQL and generated recruiter-friendly analytic outputs.

title: Intelligent Financial Reporting Agent
content: Built a financial reporting assistant using GPT-4 with retrieval-augmented generation, LangChain, Vanna AI, and Microsoft Fabric. The project centralized wealth data and enabled natural-language financial analysis and reporting.

title: Cloud-Native Data Transformation Pipeline
content: Designed an end-to-end ETL pipeline with Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, AWS S3, SNS, EC2, and QuickSight. The system automated ingestion, transformation, scheduling, quality checks, and pipeline alerting.

title: Real-Time Financial Data Pipeline
content: Implemented a real-time AWS financial data pipeline using S3, EC2, EMR, Glue, Athena, Docker, and PySpark to normalize multi-currency transaction data and support near real-time analytical access.

title: Clinical Notes Disease Classification
content: Developed an NLP classification pipeline for disease prediction from clinical notes using transformers, TF-IDF, sequence encoding, PyTorch, XGBoost, and ensemble models. One resume variant reports 98 percent accuracy on more than 18,000 clinical notes.

title: Working Capital Management Analysis
content: Built Tableau dashboards for accounts receivable and accounts payable analysis using AWS RDS and SQL Server, applying DSO and DPO metrics to evaluate working capital performance.
